ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "project_progress" REAL /* Percentage completion of the project */,
  "project_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assembly_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assembly method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the assembly method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assembly method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the assembly method */,
  "method_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the assembly method (e.g., k-mer size, coverage threshold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "user_last_access" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last access to an assembly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assembly being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the assembly */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the assembly was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  "access_successful" INTEGER /* Whether the access was successful or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assembly the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the quality metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the quality metric (e.g., percentage, bp) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reference_genomes" (
  "genome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference genome */,
  "genome_name" TEXT /* Name of the reference genome */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species the reference genome belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the reference genome */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the reference genome */,
  "gc_percentage" REAL /* GC content percentage of the reference genome */,
  "genome_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the reference genome */,
  "genome_source" TEXT /* Source of the reference genome (e.g., NCBI, Ensembl) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genome_id")
)
